title: ACCI to Hold Webinar on Budget Implementation
description: The National Chamber Policy Centre of Abuja Chamber of Commerce and Industry (ACCI) is to hold a virtual conference on implementation of Budget 2021 and review the 2022 budget proposals. The Webinar t
html:
The National Chamber Policy Centre of Abuja Chamber of Commerce and Industry (ACCI) is to hold a virtual conference on implementation of Budget 2021 and review the 2022 budget proposals.

The Webinar to have as Chief Host, the president of the ACCI is scheduled for Tuesday 21st September, 2021 with the Minister of State for Budget and Planning, Mr. Prince Clem Agba as the Keynote speaker.

Other speakers include, the Director General, Budget Office of the Federation, Mr Ben Akabueze; the Statistician General of the Federation, Mr. Simon Harry and representative of KPMG.

The Webinar which will focus on analysing the implementation of 2021 budget and reviewing of 2022 budget proposals is to allow for effective business planning and also strengthening business appreciation of government fiscal policies and measures.

The registration link for the event is
